errors.title: Error
errors.authSendFailedRetry: Failed to send verification code, please try again later
errors.networkCheckConnection: Please check your connection and try again
errors.smsCodeExpired: Code expired, please request a new one
errors.smsTooManyAttempts: Too many attempts, please request a new code
errors.networkCheckRetry: Network error, please check your connection and try again

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Quick sign-in with phone number
login.firstLoginHint: First-time sign-in will auto-register your account
login.phoneInvalidSimplified: Please enter a valid phone number
login.agreePrefix: I have read and agree to the

android.title: Android capability notes
android.body: This build ships the Android shell, LAN auto-discovery, basic pairing, and diagnostics export. QR pairing, the real upload queue, background reconnection, and incremental sync have not yet been ported to the Android native engine.

myDevice.label: My device name
myDevice.hint: This name will be shown on your Mac

photoPermission.title: Photo access is off
photoPermission.body: Allow access to Photos to keep auto-sync running.

switchDevice.title: Switch device
switchDevice.body: Disconnect from the current computer and switch to another device? You will need to enter a new pairing code.

resetSync.title: Reset all sync state
resetSync.body: This clears all sync records and disconnects the current device. You will need to re-enter a pairing code. Photos on your phone and Mac will not be deleted.

logout.title: Log out
logout.body: Are you sure you want to log out?

exportUnavailable.title: Cannot export
exportUnavailable.body: This build does not support exporting the diagnostics bundle.

exportFailed.title: Export failed
exportFailed.body: Failed to export the diagnostics bundle. Please try again later.
